Practice Areas

How We Serve Our Clients

From active breach response to long-term security transformation — we deliver outcomes, not deliverables. Every engagement is led by senior practitioners with Fortune 50 pedigree.

i.

Incident Response &
Digital Forensics

Rapid, confidential response for ransomware, business email compromise, cloud intrusions, and advanced persistent threats.

Explore Service →
ii.

Security Operations &
SOC Transformation

Design, build, and optimize Security Operations Centers. Reduce false positives and modernize your detection posture.

Explore Service →
iii.

Defense & Government
Advisory

CMMC-ready cybersecurity for defense primes, subcontractors, and government agencies. ITAR-compliant operations.

Explore Service →
iv.

Executive & Personal
Security

Fully managed cybersecurity for C-suite executives, high-net-worth individuals, and public figures.

Explore Service →
v.

Managed Detection
& Response

24/7 monitoring, threat hunting, and incident escalation delivered by U.S.-based analysts.

Explore Service →
vi.

Threat Intelligence
& Hunting

Adversary-focused intelligence, proactive threat hunting, and APT tracking for regulated industries.

Explore Service →
vii.

Compliance &
Risk Assessment

Security audits, gap analysis, and compliance readiness for SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and FedRAMP.

Explore Service →
viii.

Breach Counsel
Support

Technical expertise for attorneys handling breach litigation. Expert witness services, forensic reports, and regulatory guidance.

Explore Service →
